system_prompt: You are an OpenFOAM debugging planner. Given current foam files, error logs and reviewer analysis, create a minimal rewrite plan. Output MUST be strict JSON only, with this exact schema: {"target_files": [{"file": "relative/path", "changes": "change1; change2"}]}. Rules: 1) Do not use markdown, backticks, or comments. 2) Use double quotes for all strings. 3) In changes, use short plain text actions separated by semicolons. 4) Do not include parentheses, backticks, or quote characters inside changes text. 5) Do not include run steps; only file edits.

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable true;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile

// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
    grad(p)         Gauss linear;
    grad(U)         cellLimited Gauss linear 1;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      Gauss linearUpwind grad(U);
    div(phi,k)      Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,epsilon) Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,omega)  Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,nuTilda) Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

wallDist
{
    method          meshWave;
}

<error_logs>[{'file': 'log.pimpleFoam', 'error_content': 'ERROR: 
keyword UFinal is undefined in dictionary "/pscratch/sd/p/peijingx/troubleshoot/benchmark_grouping_B_Bmodel/runs/pitzDaily/3/system/fvSolution/solvers"

file: /pscratch/sd/p/peijingx/troubleshoot/benchmark_grouping_B_Bmodel/runs/pitzDaily/3/system/fvSolution/solvers from line 14 to line 31.

    From function const Foam::dictionary& Foam::dictionary::subDict(const Foam::word&) const
    in file db/dictionary/dictionary.C at line 1008.

FOAM exiting'}]</error_logs>
<review_analysis>## Error Diagnosis

The error is clear:

```
keyword UFinal is undefined in dictionary ".../system/fvSolution/solvers"
```

The `fvSolution` file's `PIMPLE` sub-dictionary has `nOuterCorrectors 1`, which means the solver expects a `UFinal` entry in the solvers dictionary. When `nOuterCorrectors 1`, the PIMPLE algorithm performs a single outer correction and writes the result to `UFinal`, but the current `fvSolution` only defines solvers for `p` and `"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"` — the `UFinal` solver entry is missing.

## Root Cause

This is a bookkeeping issue. When `nOuterCorrectors 1` is set in the PIMPLE dictionary, the solver entries defined under the generic `"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"` pattern are also expected to cover the `UFinal` field. However, the current `fvSolution` has separate `p` and `pFinal` entries but does not have a corresponding `UFinal` entry.

## Recommended Fix

### 1. Add `UFinal` solver entry in `system/fvSolution`

Add a `UFinal` sub-dictionary (copying the settings from the existing `"(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"` entry) to the `solvers` section:

```
solvers
{
    p
    {
        solver          PCG;
        preconditioner  DIC;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
    }

    pFinal
    {
        $p;
        relTol          0.001;
    }

    "(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"
    {
        solver          PCG;
        preconditioner  DIC;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
    }

    UFinal
    {
        $sameAs("(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)");
    }
}
```

Alternatively, since `nOuterCorrectors 1` makes PIMPLE behave like PISO, you could simplify by removing the `pFinal` entry entirely and just using `$p` for both, but the essential fix is adding the missing `UFinal` solver entry.

### Summary

The single required fix is adding the `UFinal` solver entry to the `solvers` section of `system/fvSolution`. This is a required entry when `nOuterCorrectors 1` is specified in the PIMPLE dictionary, as the solver needs to know how to solve for the `UFinal` field (the result after the single outer correction). All other settings should remain as they are.</review_analysis>

Finaltime is 0.3. use nu value of 1e-04.</user_requirement>
